task_completion.description: Navigate to the Asset Maintenances section in Snipe-IT
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the Snipe-IT web interface (http://localhost:8000) with the 'Asset Maintenances' page or creation form open.

Snipe-IT form or list view showing ASSET-0001 with Supplier 'Acme Corp', Type 'Maintenance', Cost '450.00', Start Date '2025-02-15', Completion Date '2025-02-18', and notes mentioning cooling fans or firmware.
Snipe-IT form or list view showing ASSET-0002 with Supplier 'Dell', Type 'Repair', Cost '275.00', Start Date '2025-02-20', Completion Date '2025-02-22', and notes mentioning HDD or SSD.
Snipe-IT form or list view showing ASSET-0003 with Supplier 'Lenovo', Type 'Upgrade', Cost '180.00', Start Date '2025-03-01', Completion Date '2025-03-01', and notes mentioning RAM.
Snipe-IT form or list view showing ASSET-0005 with Supplier 'HP', Type 'Maintenance', Cost '320.00', Start Date '2025-02-25', an empty/blank Completion Date, and notes mentioning fuser replacement.

task_completion.description: Verify all four records are saved in the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Asset Maintenances list view displaying the 4 newly created records with their respective titles ('Annual preventive maintenance...', 'Hard drive replacement...', 'RAM upgrade...', 'Printer quarterly maintenance').

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to create records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the browser-based Snipe-IT UI, not terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Records were entered into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are visible inside the Snipe-IT application fields, not just typed into a text editor or a mock webpage.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the DOM to falsely show the records in the list view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verifier explicitly checks the database for exactly 4 specific maintenance records (ASSET-0001, ASSET-0002, ASSET-0003, ASSET-0005). Each record is evaluated on maintenance type, start date, completion date, cost, supplier, and notes keyword. The pass threshold is 60 total points out of a maximum of 100.
